texto: America, it has been observed, is not really a melting pot. It is actually a huge potluck dinner, in which platters of roasted chicken beckon beside casseroles of pasta, mounds of tortillas, stew pots of gumbo, and skillets filled with pilafs of every imaginable color.
explicacao: Citação de Andrea Chesman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “America, it has been observed, is not really a melting pot. It is actually a huge potluck dinner,…” articula reflexao, america, food em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como food.
